raw_reaction: 正しいが、Hawkesクラスターという衣装を着せても中身は既存の分枝個体群・Yule系譜の平均方程式そのものだ。生涯忘れない別解とは言えない。
reason: The candidate correctly maps surviving prefixes to a branching/self-exciting cluster and derives M'=M, but it is substantially the same idea as the existing branching population and Yule genealogy solutions, so it is not distinct enough for the exact target line.
